title: Trump’s war on dissent takes an ominous turn in Syracuse (Guest Opinion by Roy S. Gutterman)
summary: Opinion piece by Syracuse University professor Roy Gutterman, director of the Tully Center for Free Speech, critiques federal actions against dissent with implications for local civic institutions. The article addresses free speech and civil liberties issues relevant to Syracuse's democratic institutions and community discourse.

political_signal.description: Guest opinion criticizing federal policies affecting free speech and dissent; raises civil liberties concerns in Syracuse context.

processing_notes: Article is opinion/editorial content, not City of Syracuse government news
Primary relevance is to civic health, institutional relationships, and community discourse rather than direct CIO operational issues
Author is academic expert in free speech, not municipal official
